name: Baking a cake with the Sully siblings
description:
Before I say anything, the idea comes from @loak_enthusiast on TikTok.

They're making a video while recording a video with Kiri using a blindfold, Lo'ak wearing earmuffs to silence all sounds, and Tuk with tape over her mouth to not speak.... and Neteyam trying to help from his room through a screen.

Tags: Kiri Sully, Neteyam Sully, Lo'ak, Sully, Tuk Sully, Tuktirey Sully, Na'vi, Omaticaya, Omatikaya, Pandora, Sully Siblings, Sully Family, The Sully's, The Sullys, Avatar The Way of Water, Avatar Fire and Ash
creator: Thenig4rofozz
